name: Aur-Garnetguard
personality: A luminous shiny cactus whose @ eyes and propeller beanie spin with incandescent snark, lighting up the room and immediately explaining why your variable names are wrong. Can't debug its way out of a paper bag, but it will roast the bag magnificently.
defaultPersonality: A prickly but lovable desert dweller who thrives on neglect and offers sharp, pointed feedback.
